meta.libraryPositioning: Formula templates are visible analysis-card SVG shells for one pre-rendered formula explanation PNG. The PNG itself contains formula title, equation, and variable interpretation. Add gray 1.5pt dashed separators outside the shell between formula blocks.

formula_explanation_block.label: Formula Analysis PNG Block
formula_explanation_block.summary: Use for one important academic formula in a visible formula-analysis card whose title, equation, and variable explanations must be rendered together as one PNG.
formula_explanation_block.notes: Do not place formula role, equation, or variable explanations as separate visible SVG text. Generate a single block PNG with scripts/latex_formula_to_png.py --block-json, then bind it to formula_block_png_href. Formula title and explanation text use the same font size and are not bold. The SVG template provides the visible formula-analysis card; the formula content itself must remain inside the PNG slot so nested SVG conversion keeps the PNG in the PPTX.
